nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.grounding_span: It created a skeleton that I just had to verify and modify, rather than building from scratch

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: Distrust in AI for open-ended or unverifiable tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I had a lack of understanding and low level of trust for AI during the time

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.label_negative: Workplace policy ambiguity restricting AI use
nodes.grounding_span: the workplace had rules on the use of AI that I did not fully understand, which caused some additional hesitation

nodes.label: Specialized AI tools for specific pipeline stages
nodes.grounding_span: input a CAD model and all of the requirements and specifications the part must meet into AI, then it determines what type of analysis to run

nodes.label: Control and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I tested it by giving it an input variable to output to excel and stepping line by line to see if it would create the spreadsheet and output that variable where I wanted

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for code generation
nodes.grounding_span: It definitely cut down on the time it would've taken me to develop the code if I did not use it

nodes.label: Hesitation due to trust and policy concerns
nodes.grounding_span: I had a lack of understanding and low level of trust for AI during the time

nodes.label: Aspirational desire for full pipeline automation
nodes.grounding_span: It would be nice if I was able to input a CAD model and all of the requirements and specifications the part must meet into AI

nodes.label: Methodical step-by-step verification
nodes.grounding_span: I tested it by giving it an input variable to output to excel and stepping line by line

nodes.label: Pragmatic tool adoption based on labor intensity
nodes.grounding_span: Choosing AI to help with this seemed like a great idea after I realized how labor intensive it was to read through the guides
